title: AnyRun report analysis
description: Dynamic analysis of malware can be conducted using public sandbox platforms such as ANY.RUN, which execute suspicious files in a controlled environment and record their behaviour.In this question, you are given a file hash and its corresponding sandbox report. Use the report to answer the questions that follow. What process was a victim of injection?
hints: In the AnyRun report inspect the 'Behavior activties'
The victim process is commonly used to handle your files
